who: HR payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll processing causes errors in tax filings. We automate tax filing instead of manual tax filing processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual payroll processing leads to errors in tax filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll administrators
Indie Hackers posts about payroll processing solutions
DM outreach to HR payroll administrators with demo video
Community forums where payroll tools are discussed
try_it: Let users try tax filing generation and error-checking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
